response.prompt: energy and power for GIC-01-N3-UPS-01 over the last 7 days

page.story: - Consumption + power demand + conversion efficiency, with an anomaly/loss overlay.

layout.layout_shape: 2x2 named-area CSS grid: a fixed ~280-400px left rail column and a flexible right column over two equal-height rows, with the bottom row conditionally collapsing the anomalies chart to full-width when no input/output data exists.

cards.title: Today's Energy
cards.story: This card provides the total energy consumption for GIC-01-N3-UPS-01 over the selected 7-day period, establishing the baseline volume of active and reactive energy used.

cards.title: Power Energy Analysis
cards.story: This card visualizes the daily energy trend and demand profile over the last 7 days, allowing you to identify patterns in active and reactive power usage.

swap.criterion: The card's 'demand-profile' endpoint and 'active-reactive' segmented tabs directly visualize the 'daily energy trend and demand profile' and 'active and reactive power usage' specified in the story angle. Swap candidates focus on PF, harmonics, or single-phase voltage/current history, which do not serve the core energy/power demand trend angle.
swap.reason: The current card (Power Energy Analysis) is the exact match for the assigned story angle (energy trend + demand profile + active/reactive power). Swap candidates (Load Impact, Distortion, Voltage/Current History) serve different analytical angles (PF health, harmonics, single-parameter history) and are less relevant to the 'energy/power demand' story.

_per_leaf_gaps: fields[0] kind=bucketed missing a resolved column

cards.title: Input vs Output Energy
cards.story: This card quantifies the efficiency of the UPS system by comparing input versus output energy, highlighting any delivery losses over the period.

_honest_blanked: data.lossPctOfInput: No same-quantity column or library fn exists to compute 'loss pct of input' (requires a distinct loss-energy or efficiency source; lossPct is a distribution-loss-percent, not a loss-of-input ratio).

data.expectedLossKwh: const 0.0 has no real DB source (not a nameplate rating slot/metric, no matching app_config consts.* row) — a literal in a data slot must come from asset_nameplate or app_config; leaf honest-blanks

_emit_gaps.reason: data.lossPctOfInput — no data binding was emitted for this leaf; left blank (no measured source declared). (Showing UPS input power, output power (derived from input minus loss), and efficiency — per-phase power isn't measured for this asset; 'loss pct of input' is omitted as no dedicated source exists.)

data.expectedLossKwh — no data binding was emitted for this leaf; left blank (no measured source declared). (Showing UPS input power, output power (derived from input minus loss), and efficiency — per-phase power isn't measured for this asset; 'loss pct of input' is omitted as no dedicated source exists.)

cards.title: Load Anomalies
cards.story: This card investigates potential issues by flagging load anomalies where actual consumption deviated from expected levels during the last 7 days.

app_config.knowledge.refusal_line: I can only answer electrical, mechanical and energy-management questions for this EMS.
app_config.layer1b.basket.quality_guidance: The GENEROUS feasible basket MUST also include the derived QUALITY/health columns that MEASURE each quantity family the prompt covers — unbalance, per-phase deviation, spread, THD/compliance, and power-factor columns of that family (e.g. a current-family prompt includes current_unbalance_pct and the thd_current_* columns; a voltage-family prompt includes voltage_unbalance_pct and the thd_voltage_* columns). A broad monitoring / overview / status / dashboard prompt covers ALL quantity families present, so include the has_data=Y quality columns of every family. Quality columns belong in `feasible` (card-agnostic breadth); rank them in `probable` only when the prompt asks about quality.
app_config.layer1b.class_concept_hints: {"UPS": {"tokens": ["ups"], "concepts": ["battery", "backup", "autonomy", "inverter", "rectifier"]}, "DG": {"tokens": ["dg", "diesel", "genset", "generator"], "concepts": ["fuel", "engine", "runtime"]}, "Transformer": {"tokens": ["transformer", "xformer", "tf"], "concepts": ["tap", "winding", "oil temp", "oil-temp", "hv-lv", "hvlv"]}, "APFCR": {"tokens": ["apfc", "apfcr"], "concepts": ["capacitor", "kvar", "power factor bank", "pf bank", "reactive comp"]}, "Incomer": {"tokens": ["incomer", "incoming"], "concepts": ["11kv", "ht incomer", "grid incomer"]}, "AHU": {"tokens": ["ahu"], "concepts": ["air handling", "air-handling"]}, "AirWasher": {"tokens": ["airwasher", "air washer", "air-washer"], "concepts": []}, "Chiller": {"tokens": ["chiller"], "concepts": []}, "Pump": {"tokens": ["pump"], "concepts": []}, "Compressor": {"tokens": ["compressor"], "concepts": []}, "Fan": {"tokens": ["fan"], "concepts": ["exhaust", "blower"]}, "Feeder": {"tokens": ["feeder"], "concepts": ["outgoing"]}, "Panel": {"tokens": ["pcc", "mcc", "bpdb", "mldb", "pdb", "panel"], "concepts": ["busbar", "bus bar", "distribution board"]}, "Spare": {"tokens": ["spare"], "concepts": []}}
